The Nanki Music Library (J-WAn) is held in the Wakayama Prefectural Library since 2017. The Yomiuri Nippon Symphony Orchestra is still the owner of the collection and has entrusted the collection to Wakayama Prefecture since then. The Wakayama Prefectural Library manages the entire collection of it and serves as the contact point for the public. Whereas printed materials of the collection are housed in the Wakayama Prefectural Library and handwritten materials of it in the Wakayama Prefectural Museum.
The Ohki Collection, Nanki Music Library
Nanki Music Library, Ohki private collection

The music collection is held in the Wakayama Prefectural Library since 2017. The Yomiuri Nippon Symphony Orchestra Tokyo is still the owner of the collection and has entrusted the collection to Wakayama Prefecture since then. The Wakayama Prefectural Library manages the entire collection of it and serves as the contact point for the public. Whereas printed materials of the collection are housed in the Wakayama Prefectural Library and handwritten materials of it in the Wakayama Prefectural Museum.
The former RISM library siglum was J-Tn.
